typography.body_font: -apple-system, blinkmacsystemfont, 'Segoe UI', roboto, oxygen, ubuntu, cantarell, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
typography.mono_font: menlo, consolas, monaco, adwaita mono, liberation mono, lucida console, monospace

style_system.notes: All building blocks use margin-top: var(--spacing-lg) = 1.5rem as default vertical spacing. First child inside containers has margin-top: 0 !important. Mobile responsive font sizes kick in below 640px.

Heading.purpose: Renders a heading element (h1-h6) with inline markdown support, optional icon, size tokens, and text alignment.

props.name: text
props.description: Heading text content, supports inline markdown

props.name: level
props.description: HTML heading level: h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6

props.name: size
props.description: Visual size token: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl

props.name: iconName
props.description: Name of icon to display alongside heading

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Icon placement: before or after text

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of text prop

css_selectors..heading: outer element (h1-h6 tag), has margin-top: var(--spacing-lg)
css_selectors..heading-inner: inner span controlling font-size and alignment
css_selectors..heading-text: span wrapping the actual text content

default_styles.font-size: inherits from parent unless size prop set

gaps: No color prop for heading text color
Heading.visual_behavior: Renders a semantic heading element with the tag from 'level' prop. Visual size is decoupled from semantic level via the 'size' prop. Text is inline-markdown rendered. Renders nothing if text is empty and no slot content (unless _component flag set).

Text.purpose: Renders block-level markdown text (paragraphs, lists, etc.) with text alignment.

props.name: text
props.description: Markdown content rendered as block-level HTML (paragraphs, lists, etc.)

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of text prop
gaps: No size prop (font-size inherits from parent)
Text.visual_behavior:
Renders markdown as full block-level HTML (paragraphs get

tags, lists get

    /
      ). Unlike SimpleText which renders inline. Renders nothing if text is empty and no slot.

SimpleText.purpose:
Renders inline markdown text in a

element with configurable font size and alignment.

props.name: size
props.description: Font size token: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of text prop

css_selectors..simple-text-content:
the

element with size and alignment classes

SimpleText.visual_behavior:
Renders inline markdown in a single

element. Uses body font sizes (--font-size-*), not heading sizes. Newlines in text are converted to
. Good for subtitles and short descriptive text.

Button.purpose: Renders a styled button or link with icon support, multiple visual variants, and size options.

props.name: iconName
props.description: Icon name to display in button

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Icon placement: before or after text

props.name: hideText
props.description: Show icon only, hide text (adds aria-label)

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style: primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost, text

props.name: link
props.description: URL for anchor element (only when element='a')

props.name: element
props.description: HTML element to render: a or button

variant.primary: bg: var(--color-bg-brand), color: var(--color-text-on-brand), border: transparent
variant.secondary: bg: var(--color-bg-muted), color: var(--color-text-strong), border: transparent
variant.tertiary: bg: transparent, color: var(--color-text-strong), border: var(--color-border-strong)
variant.ghost: bg: transparent, color: var(--color-text-strong), border: transparent
variant.text: bg: transparent, color: var(--color-brand), border: transparent, padding: 0, font-size: var(--font-size-lg)

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of text prop (inside the label-text span)

css_selectors..button: outer span with display: contents (invisible wrapper)
css_selectors..button-inner: the actual clickable element (a or button)
css_selectors..label-text: the text span inside the button

gaps: No disabled styling for anchor elements
gotchas: Outer .button span uses display: contents, so it is invisible in the DOM layout
The 'text' variant has padding: 0 and a larger font-size override
Button.visual_behavior: Renders an inline-flex button with rounded corners. Primary variant is brand-colored. The outer span is display:contents, so the actual visual element is .button-inner. Hover adds background/border transitions. Icon-only mode reduces padding.

Image.purpose: Renders an optimized responsive image with aspect ratio control, positioning, rounded corners, and background mode.

props.name: source
props.description: Image URL or local path (starting with /src/ for optimization)

props.name: priority
props.description: Eager loading, sync decoding, high fetchpriority

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio: square, landscape, portrait, widescreen, horizontal-strip

props.name: background
props.description: Background mode: absolute positioned, fills parent, object-fit: cover

css_selectors..image: outer wrapper, display: block, margin-top, overflow: hidden
css_selectors..image-inner: inner wrapper controlling aspect ratio and position
css_selectors..image-inner.ratio: enables aspect-ratio and object-fit: cover on img
css_selectors..image-inner.background: fills parent (height: 100%, width: 100%), img gets object-fit: cover

gotchas: When background=true, the .image div becomes position: absolute with inset: 0 and margin-top: 0
Local images starting with /src/ use Astro's Picture component for optimization; external URLs get plain
Image.visual_behavior: Renders a responsive image that fills its container width. When aspectRatio is set, the image is cropped with object-fit: cover. Background mode makes it an absolute-positioned fill image for use behind content. Local images get WebP optimization via Astro.

Icon.purpose: Renders an SVG icon from astro-icon with configurable size, color, background, and alignment.

props.name: size
props.description: Icon size: sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl, none

props.name: color
props.description: Icon color: default, blue, green, yellow, orange, red, purple, pink, cyan

alignX.center: display: block, margin-inline: auto, width: fit-content
alignX.end: display: block, margin-inline-start: auto, width: fit-content

css_selectors..icon-inner: inner span with size and color classes

gaps: Sizes 3xl and 4xl map to the same value as 2xl (--font-size-4xl)
gotchas: Icons in the 'social/' subdirectory automatically get fill: currentcolor via the .fill class
size='none' means no font-size set, icon inherits parent size (used when embedded in Heading/Button)
Icon.visual_behavior: Renders an inline SVG icon. Default size is 'lg' (1.625rem). When background=true, gets a light background with padding. When color is set, both icon color and background color change to a matching semantic pair.

Divider.purpose: Renders a horizontal rule with configurable vertical padding.

props.name: paddingVertical
props.description: Vertical padding around the rule: none, xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl

gaps: No color prop for the rule line
Divider.visual_behavior: Renders a subtle horizontal line with configurable vertical spacing. Always aria-hidden. Uses border-subtle color.

Spacer.purpose: Renders an invisible spacer div with configurable height for adding vertical space.

props.name: size
props.description: Spacer height: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl

Spacer.visual_behavior: An invisible block that adds vertical space. Always aria-hidden. Default height is 1rem.

Video.purpose: Renders a video player supporting YouTube (lite-youtube), Vimeo (lite-vimeo), or self-hosted HTML5 video.

props.name: type
props.description: Video type: youtube, vimeo, or omit for self-hosted

css_selectors..video: the video element, display: block, margin-top

Video.visual_behavior: Renders a lazy-loaded video player. YouTube and Vimeo use lite-element web components for performance. Self-hosted uses native <video> with controls.

Embed.purpose: Renders raw HTML content (typically an iframe) with aspect ratio control.

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio: square, landscape, portrait, widescreen

slots: Default: HTML content to embed (alternative to html prop)

css_selectors..embed-content > iframe: iframe inside gets width/height: 100%, border: none

Embed.visual_behavior: Renders raw HTML (usually an iframe) inside a container with controlled aspect ratio. The iframe fills the container. Default aspect ratio is landscape (4:3).

Counter.purpose: Renders an animated number counter that counts up when scrolled into view, with optional prefix/suffix.

props.name: size
props.description: Font size: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl (uses heading sizes)

css_selectors..counter-inner: flex container with alignment and font-size

Counter.visual_behavior: Displays a large number that animates from ~20% of the target value up to the target over 500ms when scrolled into view (IntersectionObserver with 0.6 threshold). Uses heading font sizes. Prefix and suffix are static text.

List.purpose: Renders a list (ul/ol) with items that can have icons, configurable direction, size, and alignment.

props.name: size
props.description: Font size: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl

listType.icon: list-style: none, padding: 0 (icons rendered via ListItem)

direction.horizontal: flex-flow: row wrap, gap: var(--spacing-em-md) or 2xl for bullet/numbered

slots: Default: Alternative list items instead of items array

css_selectors.ul, ol: the list element with size/direction/type classes

List.visual_behavior: Renders a flexbox list with gap-based spacing. Icon type shows custom icons per item with no bullet markers. Horizontal direction wraps items in a row.

ListItem.purpose: Renders a single list item with optional icon and inline markdown text.

props.name: text
props.description: Inline markdown text for the list item

props.name: iconName
props.description: Icon name to show before text

props.name: iconColor
props.description: Icon color (same options as Icon component)

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of text prop
ListItem.visual_behavior: Renders an <li> with optional inline icon followed by text. Icon is 1em sized so it scales with the list's font size.

DefinitionList.purpose: Renders a definition list (dl) as a two-column grid of term-definition pairs.
slots: Default: Alternative DefinitionListItem children
DefinitionList.visual_behavior: Renders a two-column grid where the first column has bold terms and the second has definitions. Alignment changes the column sizing strategy.

DefinitionListItem.purpose: Renders a single term-definition pair (dt + dd) inside a DefinitionList.
slots: Default: Alternative content for the definition (dd)
title: Alternative content for the term (dt)
DefinitionListItem.visual_behavior: Uses display: contents so the dt and dd participate directly in the parent dl grid. Title is bold.

Testimonial.purpose: Renders a styled blockquote with quote text, author name, description, and circular author image.

props.name: text
props.description: Quote text, rendered as block markdown

alignX.center: align-items: center, justify-content: center, text-align: center

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of quote text

css_selectors..testimonial: outer blockquote, margin-top, no left border
css_selectors..author: flex row, gap: var(--spacing-md)
css_selectors..name: bold author name

Testimonial.visual_behavior: Renders a bordered card with a large quote (with smart quote marks automatically added), followed by author info with circular avatar. Default alignment is centered.

Pagination.purpose: Renders a page navigation with numbered links, ellipsis, and optional prev/next arrows.

props.name: page
props.description: Astro pagination object with currentPage, lastPage, url properties

Pagination.visual_behavior: Renders a horizontal row of page number links joined together with borders. Current page is highlighted with brand color. Shows max 5 visible pages with ellipsis for gaps. Renders nothing if only 1 page.

Split.purpose: Two-column grid layout with configurable distribution, gap, vertical alignment, and responsive stacking.

props.name: firstColumnContentSections
props.description: Content blocks for the first column

props.name: secondColumnContentSections
props.description: Content blocks for the second column

props.name: verticalAlignment
props.description: Vertical alignment: top, center, bottom, stretch

props.name: reverse
props.description: Reverse visual column order (data stays same)

props.name: reverseOrderOnMobile
props.description: Whether reversed order also reverses on mobile stack

props.name: fixedWidth
props.description: Fixed width in px for fixed-flexible mode

props.name: minSplitWidth
props.description: Container width below which columns stack to single column

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap size: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl

slots: first: Content for the first column
second: Content for the second column
gotchas: Responsive stacking uses @container query at minSplitWidth (default 700px), not @media query
When reverse=true, the distribution mode is automatically flipped (e.g., third-two-thirds becomes two-thirds-third)
Each pane has container-type: inline-size for nested container queries
Gap sizes reduce on mobile (<640px viewport)
Split.visual_behavior: A two-column CSS grid that stacks vertically when the container is narrower than minSplitWidth. First child in each pane has margin-top reset to 0. Reverse swaps visual order while keeping data structure intact.

Grid.purpose: Renders a responsive grid of items with configurable min/max widths, layout mode, and gap.

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout mode: center (flexbox, centered), start (CSS grid, left-aligned)

props.name: maxItemWidth
props.description: Maximum item width in px (center mode only)

layout.center: display: flex, flex-wrap: wrap, justify-content: center, items have flex: 1 1 minWidth, max-width: maxWidth

slots: Default: Alternative GridItem children instead of items array

css_selectors..grid-item: individual grid item (in center mode: flex: 1 1 minWidth)

gaps: No columns prop (column count is auto-calculated from min/max widths)
gotchas: Center layout uses flexbox (items can be different widths within min/max), Start layout uses CSS grid (all items same width)
Min/max widths are set via CSS custom properties as inline styles
Grid.visual_behavior: A responsive grid that auto-wraps items. In center mode, items flex between min and max width and center in the container. In start mode, items fill the grid from left. Both modes auto-calculate column count.

GridItem.purpose: Container for a single grid item's content, renders child building blocks.

props.name: contentSections
props.description: Array of content block definitions to render

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of contentSections
GridItem.visual_behavior: A simple container that renders child blocks. First child has margin-top reset. Single child stretches to full height. Has container-type: inline-size for nested container queries.

Card.purpose: Flexible card container with background image/color, border, rounding, padding, color scheme, before/after content slots, and optional link wrapping.

props.name: beforeContentSections
props.description: Content blocks rendered before main content (e.g. image above text)

props.name: afterContentSections
props.description: Content blocks rendered after main content

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Max width token: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl

props.name: paddingHorizontal
props.description: Horizontal padding: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl

props.name: paddingVertical
props.description: Vertical padding: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color token: base, surface, accent, highlight

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image object with source, alt, positionVertical, positionHorizontal

props.name: link
props.description: URL to make entire card a clickable link

props.name: showBeforeAfter
props.description: Whether to render before/after content sections

slots: Default: Main card content
before: Content rendered before main content (e.g. image header)
after: Content rendered after main content (e.g. footer)

css_selectors..card-inner: main container, position: relative, overflow: hidden, height: 100%
css_selectors.a.card-inner:hover: transform: scale(1.05) on hover when link
css_selectors..card-content: container-type: inline-size, height: 100%, margin-inline: auto, z-index: 10

gotchas: When link is set, card-inner becomes an <a> element with hover scale effect
background image and backgroundColor are layered: image first (z-index 10), then color overlay on top
card-content has container-type: inline-size for nested container queries
Vertical padding reduces on mobile (<640px)
Card.visual_behavior: A flexible container that can look like a simple card or a full-width section. Has three content zones: before (full-width), main (with padding/max-width), and after (full-width). Supports background images and color overlays. When linked, scales up on hover.

ButtonGroup.purpose: Groups multiple buttons in a row or column with configurable alignment.

direction.row: flex-direction: row, align center/end uses justify-content
direction.column: flex-direction: column, align start/end uses align-items

alignX.start: row: justify-content: flex-start | column: align-items: flex-start
alignX.center: row: justify-content: center | column: align-items: center
alignX.end: row: justify-content: flex-end | column: align-items: flex-end

slots: Default: Button elements instead of buttonSections array

css_selectors..button-group__items: flex container with wrap, gap: var(--spacing-sm)

gotchas: Uses is:global style tag, so CSS is not scoped
ButtonGroup.visual_behavior: A flex container that wraps buttons with small gaps. Row mode puts buttons side-by-side, column mode stacks them. Alignment controls the start/center/end positioning.

Accordion.purpose: Renders a collapsible accordion with multiple items, optional single-open mode.

props.name: openFirst
props.description: Whether the first item starts open

props.name: singleOpen
props.description: Only one item can be open at a time (uses HTML name attribute)

slots: Default: AccordionItem elements instead of items array
Accordion.visual_behavior: Container for accordion items. Items render as <details> elements. When singleOpen=true, uses the HTML name attribute on details so the browser ensures only one is open.

AccordionItem.purpose: Renders a single collapsible accordion item using <details>/<summary> with animated chevron icon.

props.name: title
props.description: Accordion item title shown in the summary

props.name: accordionName
props.description: HTML name attribute for single-open grouping

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of contentSections

css_selectors..accordion-item-title: flex, space-between, font-size: var(--font-size-xl), bold, padding: var(--spacing-md)

AccordionItem.visual_behavior: Uses native <details>/<summary> for no-JS collapsing. Title bar has a chevron that animates rotation on open/close. Content area animates in with grow-out animation (300ms). Hover state highlights the summary.

Carousel.purpose: Renders a scrollable carousel with slides, navigation arrows, indicators, and autoplay using Embla Carousel.

props.name: slidesToScroll
props.description: Number of slides to scroll at a time, or 'auto'

props.name: slideWidthPercent
props.description: Slide width as percentage of viewport

slots: Default: CarouselSlide elements instead of slides array

css_selectors..controls-wrapper: flex centered, gap: var(--spacing-md), margin-top: var(--spacing-sm)

gaps: No peek (showing partial next slide) without manual slideWidthPercent tuning
gotchas: Uses Embla Carousel library (JavaScript required)
autoScroll mode automatically disables indicators and arrows
Slide width controlled via CSS custom properties set as inline styles
Carousel.visual_behavior: A horizontally scrolling carousel powered by Embla. Slides can be full-width or partial. Controls include rounded arrow buttons and dot indicators. Supports looping, autoplay (3s interval), and continuous auto-scroll.

CarouselSlide.purpose: Container for a single carousel slide's content.

props.name: contentSections
props.description: Content blocks to render inside the slide

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of contentSections
CarouselSlide.visual_behavior: A flex item container for slide content. Width is controlled by the parent Carousel's CSS custom properties.

ContentSelector.purpose: Tab-based content switcher using CSS-only radio buttons, with side or top navigation.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of tab items with title and contentSections

props.name: navigationPosition
props.description: Tab navigation position: start (left sidebar), top (horizontal tabs)

navigationPosition.start: CSS grid: minmax(10rem, 20rem) minmax(0, 1fr), tabs on left with vertical border
navigationPosition.top: flex with wrap, tabs on top with bottom border, centered headings

slots: Default: ContentSelectorPanel elements instead of items array

css_selectors..content-selector-items: tab container (grid or flex based on nav position)
css_selectors..content-selector-items.nav-top: flex wrap layout: horizontal tabs + content below

gotchas: Uses CSS-only tab switching via radio buttons (no JavaScript)
First tab auto-selected via CSS :has() when no radio is checked
ContentSelector.visual_behavior: A CSS-only tab component. In start mode, tabs appear as a left sidebar list with an active indicator border. In top mode, tabs appear as horizontal tabs above the content. Only one panel is visible at a time.

ContentSelectorPanel.purpose: Single tab panel with radio input, label tab, and content area for ContentSelector.

props.name: contentSections
props.description: Content blocks shown when tab is active

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether this tab is initially selected

props.name: groupName
props.description: Radio group name for tab switching

props.name: navigationPosition
props.description: Affects heading alignment: start or top

slots: Default: Alternative content instead of contentSections

css_selectors..content-selector-tab: clickable tab label with hover effect
css_selectors..content-selector-panel: display: none by default, animation: fade-in

ContentSelectorPanel.visual_behavior: CSS-only tab switching using hidden radio inputs and adjacent sibling selectors. Tab labels have a hover state and an animated active indicator line. Panel content fades in when selected.

CustomSection.purpose: Top-level page section with background image/color, color scheme, padding, max-width, and rounded corners. The primary container for composing page layouts.

props.name: label
props.description: Section label, used for auto-generating id

props.name: contentSections
props.description: Array of content block definitions to render

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Max content width: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl

props.name: paddingHorizontal
props.description: Horizontal padding: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl, 5xl, 6xl

props.name: paddingVertical
props.description: Vertical padding: xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl, 5xl, 6xl

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background color token: base, surface, accent, highlight

props.name: backgroundImage
props.description: Background image with source, alt, positionVertical, positionHorizontal, priority

props.name: rounded
props.description: Apply border-radius: var(--radius-xl) = 24px with overflow: hidden

slots: Default: Content blocks instead of contentSections array
gotchas: Default paddingVertical is '4xl' (5rem / 3rem mobile) - the largest default of any component
CustomSection has padding up to 6xl (7rem) while Card only goes up to 2xl (3rem)
rounded uses --radius-xl = 24px (vs Card's --radius-md = 12px)
Vertical padding reduces on mobile (<640px) by roughly 2 steps
content has container-type: inline-size enabling container queries in children
CustomSection.visual_behavior: The primary page-level section wrapper. Creates a full-width section with generous default vertical padding (5rem). Supports background images and color overlays behind the content. Content is horizontally centered with optional max-width. When rounded, gets large corner radius with hidden overflow.

Form.purpose: Renders an HTML form element with method=post and multipart/form-data encoding.

props.name: formBlocks
props.description: Array of form field block definitions

slots: Default: Form field elements instead of formBlocks array
Form.visual_behavior: A standard HTML form wrapper. Renders child form field blocks inside it. Always uses POST method with multipart encoding.

Input.purpose: Renders a labeled text input field with configurable type, placeholder, and required indicator.

props.name: type
props.description: Input type: text, email, tel, number, etc.

props.name: required
props.description: Whether the field is required (shows * indicator)

css_selectors..input: flex column, gap: var(--spacing-xs), margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md), width: 100%
css_selectors..label: label element

Input.visual_behavior: A standard form input with label above. Required fields show a red asterisk. Full-width by default with bottom margin for spacing between fields.

Textarea.purpose: Renders a labeled textarea field with configurable placeholder and required indicator.

css_selectors..textarea: flex column, gap: xs, margin-bottom: md, width: 100%

Textarea.visual_behavior: A standard textarea with label. Same layout pattern as Input.

Select.purpose: Renders a labeled select dropdown with options array or slot content.
slots: Default: SelectOption elements (used when options array is empty)

css_selectors..select: flex column, gap: xs, margin-bottom: md, width: 100%

Select.visual_behavior: A standard select dropdown with label. Placeholder option is disabled.

SelectOption.purpose: Renders a single <option> element inside a Select component.
slots: Default: Additional content inside option

Submit.purpose: Renders a submit button (wraps Button component with type='submit').
slots: Default: Alternative button content
Submit.visual_behavior: A Button component configured as a submit button. Has margin-top for spacing from form fields above.

ChoiceGroup.purpose: Renders a group of radio buttons or checkboxes with labels, supporting vertical or horizontal orientation.

props.name: multiple
props.description: If true, renders checkboxes instead of radio buttons

css_selectors..choice-group: flex column, gap: sm, padding: md, margin-bottom: md

ChoiceGroup.visual_behavior: A fieldset with radio buttons (single select) or checkboxes (multiple select). Vertical stacks options, horizontal uses auto-fit grid.

Hidden.visual_behavior: An invisible form field that submits a hidden value.

Date.purpose: Renders a labeled date input field with optional min/max constraints.

css_selectors..date: flex column, gap: xs, margin-bottom: md, width: 100%

Date.visual_behavior: A standard date picker input with label. Same layout pattern as Input.

FileUpload.purpose: Renders a labeled file upload input with accept and multiple file support.

css_selectors..file-upload: flex column, gap: xs, margin-bottom: md, width: 100%

FileUpload.visual_behavior: A standard file input with label. Same layout pattern as Input.

Segments.purpose: Renders a segmented control (radio/checkbox button group) with styled toggle buttons.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of {value, label, icon, checked} objects

css_selectors..segments: flex column, gap: sm, no border, no padding
css_selectors..segment: styled button with surface bg, border, hover effects

Segments.visual_behavior: A horizontal strip of toggle buttons that look connected. Selected state shows brand-colored border. First and last segments have rounded corners. Can work as single-select (radio) or multi-select (checkbox).

Slider.purpose: Renders a toggle switch (on/off slider) with label.

css_selectors..slider-container: flex, align-items: center, gap: sm, cursor: pointer
css_selectors..slider-track::before: 20px white circle knob, translates 22px when checked

Slider.visual_behavior: A toggle switch with a sliding circular knob. The track changes color when checked. Label appears to the right of the switch.
